description: baseline (curriculum_s2, autoexp evaluator)
H1.1 v1_weight=0.5 in VisibilityAwareSimCC
H1.3 soft attention mask + v1_weight=0.5 (OccludedRTMCCHead overhead hurts)
H2.1 hidden_dims=128 (significant degradation, capacity too low)
H2.2 GAU dropout=0.1 (no gain vs H1.1)
H3.3 RandomEdgesBlackout crop aug (slight degradation)
H1.1b v1_weight=0.25 (sweet spot is 0.5)
H2.3 expansion_factor=4 (GAU modifications consistently fail)
H3.2 BoundaryAwareWeight (ties H1.1, new complexity not justified)
H1.1c v1_weight=0.0 (0.5 is optimal, not 0)
H1.4 v1=0.5 v2=3.0 (v2 boost marginal, 4:1 ratio is optimal)
H2.4 SplitGAURTMCCHead face/body (cross-group info important)
beta=15 sharper targets (too precise, hurts robustness)
lr=5e-5 (lower LR doesn't help, still peaks at epoch 4)
simcc_ratio=3.0 (cls_x/y reinit too costly in 10 epochs)
minimal-aug flip-only (augmentation is needed for generalization)
wd=0.01 reduced weight_decay (no gain)
H1.1d v1_weight=0.75 (confirms 0.5 is optimal)
H3.3b light crop aug (all crop aug variants hurt)
multistep-lr step decay schedule (no gain)
sigma-narrow (4.0,4.6) narrower targets (slightly worse)
sigma-wide (5.5,6.3) wider targets (no gain, standard optimal)
H1.2 progressive v1 warmup 0.1→0.5 (slower start hurts, jump to 0.5 is better)
H_EMA ExponentialMovingAverage (best at epoch 2, EMA interferes with fine-tune convergence)
H_LLRD backbone lr*0.1 (backbone already adapted in curriculum_s2, LLRD hurts)
H_rel_bias GAU use_rel_bias=True (adding attention bias doesn't help)
H_pos_enc GAU rotary pos encoding (position encoding doesn't help)
H3.2b BoundaryAwareWeight buggy (vis<0.5 skips Gaussian target generation)
